entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species Sorghum bicolor being improved for Striga resistance

entities.name: STRIGA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that causes significant yield loss in sorghum

entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist infestation by Striga

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with resistance to Striga

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED FOREGROUND SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding technique used to select for the presence of specific target genes or QTLs in offspring

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used for genotyping and identifying polymorphism

entities.name: N13
entities.description: The donor parent providing the Striga resistance QTLs

entities.name: DANYANA
entities.description: A recurrent parent used in the development of backcross lines

entities.name: SAMSORG39
entities.description: A recurrent parent used in the development of backcross lines

entities.name: BACKCROSS LINES
entities.description: Plant lines developed by crossing an F1 hybrid back to its recurrent parent

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity caused by Striga infestation

entities.name: STRIGA INFESTATION
entities.description: The occurrence and spread of Striga in sorghum fields

entities.name: MARKER POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The analysis of genetic variation at specific marker loci between different parents

entities.name: MARKER ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: The use of molecular markers to select for desired traits in breeding programs
